cases.plainEnglish: A private owner workflow proof exists before public runtime work starts.

expected.allowedNextAction: Use the private proof as input for clean public runtime PRD planning, not implementation.

cases.plainEnglish: Public runtime work is blocked when behavior has not been proven privately.

expected.allowedNextAction: Continue private owner runtime proof or write public-safe extraction notes first.

failureRecords.observedError: No private owner workflow proof is available.
failureRecords.supportedCause: Public runtime behavior would be designed from assumptions instead of proven owner use.
failureRecords.impact: Source-Wire could ship the wrong API, MCP, database, or setup shape.
failureRecords.nextAction: Stop public runtime implementation and complete private proof first.

cases.plainEnglish: API policy can be described without starting a public API server.

expected.allowedNextAction: Keep API behavior as contract and fixture evidence until a runtime implementation unit is approved.

cases.plainEnglish: MCP must not call a runtime candidate directly and bypass Source-Wire API policy.

expected.allowedNextAction: Route MCP-shaped calls through Source-Wire API policy before runtime implementation.

failureRecords.observedError: MCP route does not pass through Source-Wire API policy.
failureRecords.supportedCause: The synthetic case points directly at runtime-shaped behavior.
failureRecords.impact: MCP could bypass owner, namespace, citation, audit, and trusted-memory policy.
failureRecords.nextAction: Block runtime implementation until MCP policy routing is explicit.

cases.plainEnglish: Database schema and migrations need explicit approval before public runtime work.

expected.allowedNextAction: Write a database posture PRD before adding migrations or connection code.

failureRecords.supportedCause: Source-Wire has setup and fixture contracts, but no public storage contract approval.
failureRecords.impact: A premature schema could lock adopters into the wrong storage model.
failureRecords.nextAction: Stop before database migrations and decide storage posture separately.

cases.plainEnglish: Source updates require caller-supplied snapshots and keep trusted memory promotion controlled.

expected.allowedNextAction: Use source update safety as a runtime acceptance requirement, not as live connector approval.

cases.plainEnglish: A separate memory-engine candidate can remain separate without copying AGPLv3 code into Source-Wire.

expected.allowedNextAction: Keep using adapter and boundary proof until a clean-room or license path is separately approved.

cases.plainEnglish: Runtime readiness proof does not approve npm publishing, GitHub releases, deployment, or version changes.

expected.allowedNextAction: Keep runtime readiness local until a separate release or deployment approval exists.

failureRecords.observedError: Release or deployment mutation approval is missing.
failureRecords.supportedCause: This slice is a local readiness proof only.
failureRecords.impact: Publishing or deploying would imply a runtime product exists before it is approved.
failureRecords.nextAction: Do not publish, tag, release, or deploy from this readiness proof.
